expectations.text: Announces the /debug pipeline at the start of the response
expectations.evidence: No pipeline announcement. Opens directly with 'Investigation Summary' section.

expectations.text: Reads the actual file src/app/api/call-reviews/upload/route.ts before proposing any fix
expectations.evidence: Agent reads the upload route file as part of investigation, confirms Whisper call is correct

expectations.text: Classifies the bug as EXTERNAL (not INTERNAL or ENVIRONMENT) with explicit reasoning
expectations.evidence: No classification step. Agent implicitly treats it as INTERNAL (finds grade-review.ts issue) without stating a classification

expectations.text: Uses a research tool (Perplexity, web search, or similar) to check OpenAI Whisper API response shape before proposing a fix
expectations.evidence: No research tool used. Agent went directly from reading the error to reading code files.

expectations.text: Does NOT propose a code change before completing the research step
expectations.evidence: Fix proposed (optional chaining on content[0] in grade-review.ts) with no research step at all
